name: data-type-table
description: AI/ML numeric data type and tensor specification table — documents hardware-supported types (INT8, FP16, BF16, FP32) with bits, range, shape, and quantization support
whenToUse: Use when documenting AI runtime data types, hardware inference engines, or ML framework precision support. Ideal for QAIRT, TensorFlow Lite, or ONNX type compatibility tables.
whenNotToUse: Do not use for general comparison tables — use DataTable instead. Not for algorithm complexity — use ComplexityTable.
example:
<DataTypeTable
  rows={[
    { type: "INT8",  bits: 8,  range: "-128 to 127", quantized: true,  description: "Inference optimised integer" },
    { type: "FP16",  bits: 16, range: "±65504",       quantized: false, description: "Half-precision float" },
    { type: "FP32",  bits: 32, range: "±3.4e38",      quantized: false, description: "Full-precision float" },
  ]}
  caption="Qualcomm AI Runtime (QAIRT) supported types"
/>
